name: Pronto Pups
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Self rising corn meal mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the dry ingredients.
2. Gradually add water and beat thoroughly until smooth.
3. Dip hot dogs into the batter.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
5. Quickly drop the hot dogs into the hot oil.
6. Fry for 3 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels and serve.
